description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a deep red fabric, featuring a clean, boxy silhouette. The sofa has three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and padded, matching the overall geometric design. The base of the sofa is slightly recessed and finished in a contrasting dark color, giving it a floating appearance. The legs are not prominently visible, suggesting a block or hidden design. The upholstery is solid-colored with a matte, slightly textured finish, and the overall build suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam cushioning.
description: A modern red three-seater sofa with loose back cushions, straight padded armrests, and a solid, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large back cushions, two seat cushions, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the cushions and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back and the alignment of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the armrest and the arrangement of the cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with cushions appearing unattached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at seat height, boxy profile, no decorative elements, matching the sofa's upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not prominently visible, likely block or recessed design, finished in black, positioned at the corners and possibly along the base for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, uniform cushions, no tufting or decorative features, continuous structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red fabric with a matte, slightly textured finish, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
